title: BEM-872 read context start
objective:
Run script:
"""
ctx = Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
text = ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if ctx.exists() else ''
interesting = []
for line in text.splitlines():
    low = line.lower()
    if any(tok in low for tok in ['active', 'актив', 'bem-871', 'curator-mediated', 'next:', 'след', 'status:', 'completed', 'roadmap']):
        interesting.append(line)
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM872_AGENT_CONTEXT_START_READ.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-872 AGENT_CONTEXT start read\nStatus: READ\nContext exists: ' + str(ctx.exists()) + '\n\nKey lines:\n' + '\n'.join(interesting[-120:]) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('BEM872 read AGENT_CONTEXT start key lines')
"""
No issue comments.
